artist_name: Bob Seger & The Silver Bullet Band

versions.artist_name: Bob Seger & The Silver Bullet Band

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.artist_name: Bob Seger & The Silver Bullet Band

content:
Bob Seger And The Silver Bullet Band ---Fire Lake (Capo 2)

 
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]        
Who's gonna ride that chrome three wheeler ?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]          
Who's gonna make that first mistake ?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]              
Who wants to wear those gypsy leathers,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]        
all the way to Fire Lake?[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]                
Who wants to break the news about Uncle Joe ?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]       
You remember Uncle Joe, he was the one afraid to cut the cake.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]              
Who wants to tell poor aunt Sarah,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]          
Joe's run off to Fire Lake,               [/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]          
Joe's run off to Fire Lake.[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]               
Who wants to brave those bronze beauties  lying in the sun,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
with their long soft hair fallin',  flyin' as they run.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                        
Oh, they smile so shy and they flirt so well,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]E[/ch]
and they lay you down so fast, till you look straight up and say,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                                    
oh, Lord, am I really here at last?[/tab]

 
[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]       
wants to play those eights and aces?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]               
Who wants a raise, who needs a stake?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]            
Who wants to take that long shot gamble,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]           
and head out to Fire Lake?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]      
And head out  to Fire Lake. (4x, with varying lyrics) .....[/tab]
